name: Devin
description: An autonomous AI software engineer (agent) that can write, run, and test code and expose functionality via a REST API for integrations.

auth_methods.note: The API reference shows REST endpoints and examples using an Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY>/service user credentials (cog_ prefix), indicating API-key-style bearer tokens for authentication.

credential_access.note: The pricing page explicitly lists a Free plan that includes API access and API keys, indicating developers can obtain API access on a free self-serve plan.

api_surface.note: The API reference documents a RESTful API (base URLs, many endpoints like /models, /chat/completions, /images, /files, /usage, organization and enterprise scopes), indicating broad coverage of product objects.

buildability.note: Public REST docs exist and the pricing page shows a Free tier with API access, so a developer can sign up and start building today without special approval.
